rows.description: Computus Rectoris, Francisci Webber a 2do Die Novembris 1756 ad eundem Diem resolutuni 1757.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description, which accurately reads 'Novembris' and 'resolutuni' from the image, correcting gpt-5-mini's errors 'November' and 'revolutionum'.
rows.section_header: Computus Rectoris, Francisci Webber a 2do Die Novembris 1756 ad eundem Diem resolutuni 1757.

rows.notes: Consensus across extractors for description and type.

Selected gemini-flash's reading for description and fraction. 'Garrington Molineux' is accurate. The fraction '1/4' (0.25) is clearly visible next to the pence digit '2'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly identified the fraction as 0.5.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from Garrington Molineux.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from Garrington Molineux, amounting to £4 19s 2.25d.

rows.notes: Consensus across extractors on values. The '3/4' fraction is clearly visible in the image.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from Sadler, amounting to £4 19s 2.75d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description, as 'pro an' is clearly legible in the image, contrasting with gpt-5-mini's 'pro ??'. Amounts are clear and in agreement.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from the Clifton Ferry property.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from the Clifton Ferry property, amounting to £13 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's reading for both description and amounts. The description 'Bensington pro Bien: & Dim:' is clearly visible, as are the amounts '09 2 6'. gpt-5-mini had multiple errors in its transcription.
rows.english_description: Arrears of rent from Bensington covering a biennial period and a half-year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of rent from Bensington covering a biennial period and a half-year, amounting to £9 2s 6d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's amounts (£1 s9 d9), which accurately match the image. gpt-5-mini appears to have a one-row offset error, reporting the amounts for the subsequent row.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from the South Newington tenement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from the South Newington tenement, amounting to £1 9s 9d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's reading for both description and amounts. The description 'Ladame Comyn pro an:' is accurate. The amounts '09 6 8' are correct from the image; gpt-5-mini continued to show a one-row offset for amounts.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from Ladame Comyn.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from Ladame Comyn, amounting to £9 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's amounts (£8 s6 d8), which are correct from the image. gpt-5-mini's values were for the next row, indicating a persistent row offset issue.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from Meriton, amounting to £8 6s 8d.

rows.description: Gardington Tenem: pro Bien: & parte anni
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's reading for description ('Gardington') and amounts (£8 s14 d5.5), which are accurate from the image. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read 'Yardington' and showed a continued row offset for amounts.
rows.english_description: Rent from the Gardington tenement covering a biennial period and part of a year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from the Gardington tenement covering a biennial period and part of a year, amounting to £8 14s 5.5d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's reading. The description includes a leading dash. The amount in pounds is clearly '10', not '100', as visible in the image. gpt-5-mini misinterpreted the '10' as '100'.
rows.english_description: Rent from the Gardington rectory for a four-year period.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from the Gardington rectory for a four-year period, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini for the amount in pounds ('20'), which is clearly visible. For the description, combined gpt-5-mini's 'Gurnear' and gemini-flash's 'pro an', as it is more accurate than 'Guncar pro ??'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from Gurnear, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini for the amount in pounds ('58'), which is clearly visible. Used gemini-flash's description 'Minhennet pro an:', which is a closer reading of the script than 'Minument'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from Minhennet, amounting to £58 0s 0d.

rows.description: South Newington Rect: pro an: & Dim:
